title: Password Managers
drDigitalIntro: A password manager stores your passwords safely. Instead of remembering 50 complex passwords, you remember one master password. Apple's built-in Passwords app (or iCloud Keychain) does this automatically on your Mac and iPhone. Other popular managers: 1Password, Dashlane. Password managers generate strong passwords, auto-fill forms, and alert you if a password is compromised. Using a password manager is the best way to stay secure.
drDigitalSuccess: You know how to manage passwords safely!
drDigitalHint: Password managers are easier and more secure than remembering passwords.
